failure.symptom: Photon is a Lemmy frontend requiring Lemmy backend API. Bug confirmed via source: Comment.svelte uses svelte slide transition with {#if open} conditional rendering for comment content. Fix replaces with CSS class-based expand/collapse animation (removing slide transition import), adds setTimeout for delayed open, preventing blockquote multi-paragraph rendering issues.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Lemmy 后端 API
